query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS payments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  stripePaymentId VARCHAR(255),
  amount INT NOT NULL,
  currency VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'CHF',
  status ENUM('pending', 'completed', 'failed', 'refunded') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  paymentMethod VARCHAR(50),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  completedAt TIMESTAMP NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS payments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  stripePaymentId VARCHAR(255),
  amount INT NOT NULL,
  currency VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'CHF',
  status ENUM('pending', 'completed', 'failed', 'refunded') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  paymentMethod VARCHAR(50),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  completedAt TIMESTAMP NULL
);
